ai_summary: Central Mine Planning & Design Institute Limited (CMPDIL) issued a regulatory update disclosing the official Director Identification Number (DIN) for Shri Rajesh Davera, who was recently appointed as a Non-Official Independent Director. Shri Davera's extensive experience as a distinguished tax consultant, financial management professional, and corporate advisor is expected to strengthen the board's financial oversight and strategic capabilities. This document is a routine compliance update to an earlier director appointment, reflecting a positive governance enhancement with no identified red flags or immediate material financial impacts.
